mapper.update:
update user
name = #{name},
address = #{address},
image = #{image},
fans_counts = #{fansCounts},
follower_counts = #{followerCounts},
money = #{money},
status = #{status},
shop_id = #{shopId},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, phone, image, password, fans_counts, follower_counts, money, address, status, shop_id, create_time, update_time from user where name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.insert: insert into user (phone, name, password, create_time, update_time) values (#{phone}, #{name}, #{password}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
